name: BLUM HOLDINGS, INC.
business: Blum Holdings, Inc. is a holding company with operations throughout California providing medical and adult-use cannabis products and related services. It owns the Korova brand of high potency cannabis products across multiple product categories. The company operates retail dispensaries and distribution facilities in California.

exposures.sentence: Bl m is a publicly traded holding company with operations throughout California committed to providing the highest quality of medical and adult use cannabis products and related services.
Marijuana is a Schedule I controlled substance and is illegal under federal law.
